descriptions.demo intro: Welcome to the Puppergeist demo! This game is still in development, so we're missing a few features. Currently the Puppergeists aren't capable of saving or loading, nor can their latency be adjusted, so we recommend using wired devices for the best experience. Enjoy!
descriptions.demo ending: Thank you for playing our demo! Be sure to wishlist the full game. Our Puppergeists look forward to playing with you again!
